channel.title: 8 件事 (2026/4/25)
channel.description: 今天的技术圈真是围绕 AI 和编程工具“卷”出新高度了！OpenAI 的 Codex 和 GPT-5.5 是绝对的主角，各种围绕“Coding Plan”的讨论和工具也层出不穷。从大厂的新品发布到社区里关于成本、使用体验的吐槽，信息量巨大，但核心都指向一个方向：AI 辅助编程正在快速进入生产应用阶段。

item.title: 8 件事
item.description: 今天的技术圈真是围绕 AI 和编程工具“卷”出新高度了！OpenAI 的 Codex 和 GPT-5.5 是绝对的主角，各种围绕“Coding Plan”的讨论和工具也层出不穷。从大厂的新品发布到社区里关于成本、使用体验的吐槽，信息量巨大，但核心都指向一个方向：AI 辅助编程正在快速进入生产应用阶段。

item.title: deepseek-ai/TileKernels
item.description: A kernel library written in tilelang | 近期热门 | 总 1082 stars
item.author: deepseek-ai

item.title: masterking32/MasterHttpRelayVPN
item.description: Domain-fronted HTTP/SOCKS5 proxy tunneling traffic through Google Apps Script with MITM TLS interception, HTTP/1-2 multiplexing, and DPI evasion. | 近期热门 | 总 1055 stars
item.author: masterking32

item.title: leigest519/OpenGame
item.description: OpenGame: Open Agentic Coding for Games | 近期热门 | 总 988 stars
item.author: leigest519

item.title: cosmicstack-labs/mercury-agent
item.description: Soul-driven AI agent with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access. Runs 24/7 from CLI or Telegram. | 近期热门 | 总 755 stars
item.author: cosmicstack-labs

item.title: ZeroZ-lab/cc-design
item.description: High-fidelity HTML design and prototype guidance skill for AI agents | 近期热门 | 总 628 stars
item.author: ZeroZ-lab

item.title: levelsio/superlevels
item.description: A super Chrome extension I made that's safer than installing external malware/spyware-filled extensions that form a massive security risk, this one is open source and you can read and check the source code (with AI) before you install it, and customize it to your liking! | 近期热门 | 总 373 stars
item.author: levelsio

item.title: actionbook/ascent-research
item.description: research cli for agent | 近期热门 | 总 147 stars
item.author: actionbook

item.title: heider-x/vela
item.description: AI-powered IDE for novel writing — local LLM + RAG, privacy-first, BYOK. For web fiction authors and creative writers. | 近期热门 | 总 82 stars
item.author: heider-x

item.author: Haiker

item.author: Spira AI
